name: Friendship Cake
recipeInstructions:
See recipe, Brandied Fruit Starter for Friendship Cake.
1. Beat together eggs, sugar, vanilla, orange and butternut flavorings and oil.
2. Stir together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
3. Add 1/4 cup of the flour mixture to the coconut mixture and reserve fruit from the fruit starter and mix well.
4. The batter will be stiff; it is too stiff to work with. Add more fruit or juice from the starter if needed.
5. Pour into a greased and floured large tube or Bundt pan.
6. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
7. Let cool in the pan for 15 minutes before removing.
